_comment: BEST-EFFORT: Cursor hook wiring. Cursor's hooks subsystem does not reliably surface additional_context emitted on SessionStart, so the UserPromptSubmit (inbox-notify) path is the reliable delta channel here. The shared session-start script already emits Cursor's additional_context shape, gated on CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT; the command path passes that env var so the Cursor branch of the tri-format emit fires.
